notes: Solid Tetris implementation with ghost piece, bag randomizer, wall kicks, lock delay, and audio; minor issue with multiline fillText not rendering properly on canvas and the wall kick logic has a subtle bug where offset calculation can return 0 incorrectly, but overall very playable.
Solid implementation with ghost piece, 7-bag randomizer, and wall kicks, but pausing the game permanently softlocks it because the unpause key is blocked by the paused state.
Core falling/locking/clearing works, but pause cannot be resumed, title instructions misuse newline rendering, and there is at least one JS quality issue (implicit global dt) that lowers confidence.
